name: agentcfg
title: Agentcfg
description: Manage agentcfg from Raycast: browse items, sync configs, and check target status.
author: jorgenosberg

commands.name: manage-items
commands.title: Manage Items
commands.description: Browse items, see per-target install state, and toggle, install, or sync directly.

commands.name: sync-configs
commands.title: Sync Configs
commands.description: Run agentcfg sync across all configured agent targets.

preferences.name: binaryPath
preferences.title: agentcfg Binary
preferences.description: Path to the agentcfg binary. Leave empty to auto-detect from common install locations.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
